doctrine_enforcement_lines: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.

tickets.title: Produce Phase 6B schema/runtime baseline decision artifacts before capability execution
doctrine_enforcement_lines: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.
tickets.objective: Create the Phase 6B schema/runtime baseline decision artifacts that map all 103 seeds to current Prisma coverage, approved scaffold surfaces, missing schema decisions, validation gates, and the exact approval boundary before any capability implementation ticket can run.
scope: Record current Prisma model coverage and Phase 6B schema gaps without editing prisma/schema.prisma.
Map every Phase 6B component to existing contract, manifest, NestJS module, controller, service, and test scaffold paths.
Define which schema/model decisions must be approved before P6B-CAP-001 through P6B-CAP-015 can execute.
Keep capability implementation ticket generation and execution disabled until final review approves the baseline.
non_scope: No frontend screen, provider adapter, payment behavior, pricing engine, communication send logic, or GL posting runtime.
files_forbidden_to_change: prisma/schema.prisma
prisma/migrations/**
packages/contracts/**
apps/api/src/**
apps/web/**
package.json
pnpm-lock.yaml
required_outputs: Approved data model baseline artifact.
Tenant isolation/index/RLS metadata plan.
Prisma validation evidence.
stop_conditions: Stop if any schema model or field would need to be invented from lifecycle docs alone.
Stop if a capability ticket asks to implement runtime behavior before the baseline approval exists.
Stop if exact file ownership would overlap another active ticket.
Stop if any ticket-generation or execution flag becomes true without final review approval.
acceptance_criteria: Baseline artifacts name current Prisma models and explicitly state that complete Phase 6B commerce-domain schema is not yet implemented.
All 103 Phase 6B seeds are mapped to schema decision groups or existing scaffold surfaces.
P6B-CAP-001 through P6B-CAP-015 remain blocked until the baseline is reviewed and approved.
No runtime, Prisma, migration, contract, NestJS, frontend, package, lockfile, or generated file is changed by this ticket.
tickets.commit_message: docs: add Phase 6B schema runtime baseline decision artifacts
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert only the data-model baseline artifacts/schema changes from this ticket; do not revert scaffold-control commits.
tickets.conditional_replan_required: Required if migration path or schema ownership cannot be exact before execution.
stale_ticket_risk_notes: This ticket is intentionally blocked until human review because schema baseline spans all Phase 6B persistent data.
runtime_consistency_chain: Phase 6B source authority -> current Prisma model coverage -> existing Phase 6B scaffold files -> missing schema decision groups -> blocked/promoted ticket statuses.
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: The baseline decision artifacts explicitly map 103/103 Phase 6B seeds to current Prisma coverage, existing scaffold files, missing schema decision groups, and validation gates; `pnpm exec prisma validate --schema prisma/schema.prisma` and `pnpm registry:check` remain the required downstream proof commands before capability execution.
split_if: A reviewer determines schema baseline cannot be reviewed as one commit.
A component requires a separate ADR before schema ownership.
requires_human_approval_if: Any new Prisma model, enum, relation, unique, RLS metadata, or migration is introduced.
doctrine_enforcement: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.

promotion_audit.why_safe: The ticket is a control/baseline artifact ticket with exact docs-only outputs and explicit forbidden runtime/schema paths.
promotion_audit.why_capabilities_still_blocked: Existing Phase 6B runtime files are metadata-only scaffolds and current Prisma lacks complete commerce-domain entity coverage.

doctrine_enforcement_lines: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.

non_scope: No Prisma schema edits; depends on P6B-CAP-000.
files_forbidden_to_change: Any file outside files_expected_to_change for the active ticket.
Any frontend screen or route without a separately approved screen contract.
Any production external adapter credential or provider integration.
Any ticket-generation flag set to true before human review approval.
Any schema, permission, event, API, or ADL interpretation not grounded in committed source authority.
prisma/schema.prisma
prisma/migrations/**
required_outputs: Product Catalogue Service contract behavior updated from scaffold metadata to reviewed schemas.
Product Catalogue Service service/controller tests cover approved runtime MCR.
No ticket-generation or execution flags enabled.
tests_required: contract validator coverage for component schemas if schemas are changed
stop_conditions: Stop if exact-file plan reveals work requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Stop if the ticket cannot be completed without making an architectural decision not present in any committed source document.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
Stop if work drifts into runtime / Foundry / module installer / business modules / production auth / deployment / secrets / destructive migrations without explicit ticket authority.
Stop if a Prisma schema migration is required but not authorized in files_expected_to_change.
Stop if any unresolved Phase 6B source ambiguity requires Codex to invent a business rule.
Stop if implementation requires changing Prisma schema without the P6B-CAP-000 baseline.
Stop if approved route/API behavior is missing.
acceptance_criteria: All 4 source seeds are represented by observable runtime behavior or explicitly tested non-runtime handling.
Tests prove tenant isolation assumptions from the approved schema baseline.
No capability behavior remains scaffold-only for covered seeds.

doctrine_enforcement: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.

promotion_audit.why_not_executable: This gate can only run after P6B-CAP-000 and all promoted capability tickets pass final review.

v16_grounding_summary: P6B-CAP-000 is executable-review-ready as a schema/runtime baseline control ticket. Capability implementation tickets remain blocked because current Phase 6B runtime scaffolds are metadata-only and the current Prisma schema does not contain a complete Phase 6B commerce-domain entity baseline.
